metadata.description: Agent skills for social media content creation, viral hooks, scripting, and brainstorming

plugins.name: social-media-content-creation-skill
plugins.description: Skills for content creators, marketers, and personal brands: short-form content structures, short-form content maxing, video formats (yap, educational, storytelling), carousel content structures, organic zero-to-10k growth sprints, scripting templates, hooks, B2B vs B2C content creation strategies, brainstorming ideas for viral TikTok, Reels, YouTube Shorts, high-converting Facebook/Meta Ads, and organic account growth strategy by follower count
